description:
An opinionated, fast, native android app for Logseq 
FastLog is an opinionated, fast, native android app for Logseq. It works with your existing Logseq graph folder.

Features:
- Extremely fast startup time
- Fast full-text search and navigation
- Bidirectional [[wiki links]] with autocomplete
- Handles large graphs
- Lightweight

FastLog reads and writes standard Logseq markdown files, so it's always compatible with the desktop app.

Note: FastLog only supports the markdown version of Logseq (i.e. Logseq OG); DB version is not supported.
